requirement_topic.en: EMC — Emissions (EN 55014-1) — Poland via EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——发射要求（EN 55014-1）——波兰依据欧盟EMC指令2014/30/EU
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——發射要求（EN 55014-1）——波蘭依據歐盟EMC指令2014/30/EU

summary.en: Poland is an EU member state and fully implements EMC Directive 2014/30/EU through national transposition (Ustawa o kompatybilności elektromagnetycznej). Heat pumps placed on the Polish market must comply with electromagnetic emission limits under the harmonised standard EN 55014-1:2021 (conducted and radiated emission limits for household appliances, electric tools, and similar apparatus). PKN (Polish Committee for Standardization) adopts EN 55014-1 as PN-EN 55014-1 without modification. Testing must be performed at a ILAC/EA-accredited or otherwise EU-recognised laboratory. Grid reference: 230/400 V, 50 Hz.
summary.zh: 波兰是欧盟成员国，通过国家转化立法（电磁兼容法）全面实施欧盟EMC指令2014/30/EU。投放波兰市场的热泵须满足协调标准EN 55014-1:2021规定的电磁发射限值（家用电器、电动工具及类似器具的传导和辐射发射限值）。PKN（波兰标准化委员会）将EN 55014-1不加修改地采标为PN-EN 55014-1。测试须在ILAC/EA认可或其他欧盟认可实验室进行。电网参考：230/400 V，50 Hz。
summary.zht: 波蘭是歐盟成員國，通過國家轉化立法（電磁相容法）全面實施歐盟EMC指令2014/30/EU。投放波蘭市場的熱泵須滿足協調標準EN 55014-1:2021規定的電磁發射限值（家用電器、電動工具及類似器具的傳導和輻射發射限值）。PKN（波蘭標準化委員會）將EN 55014-1不加修改地採標為PN-EN 55014-1。測試須在ILAC/EA認可或其他歐盟認可實驗室進行。電網參考：230/400 V，50 Hz。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/30/EU (EMC Directive) — transposed to Polish law

summary.en: GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household electrical appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission) is China's national adoption of CISPR 14-1. EMC emission testing is included under CCC certification for domestic appliances, conducted at CNAS/CMA accredited laboratories. Chinese test reports under GB 4343.1 are not accepted as evidence of EU/Polish EMC Directive conformity.
summary.zh: GB 4343.1-2018（家用电器、电动工具和类似器具的电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射）是中国对CISPR 14-1的国家采标。电磁发射测试纳入家用电器CCC认证范围，由CNAS/CMA认可实验室进行。GB 4343.1下的中国测试报告不被接受为欧盟/波兰EMC指令合规证明。
summary.zht: GB 4343.1-2018（家用電器、電動工具和類似器具的電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射）是中國對CISPR 14-1的國家採標。電磁發射測試納入家用電器CCC認證範圍，由CNAS/CMA認可實驗室進行。GB 4343.1下的中國測試報告不被接受為歐盟/波蘭EMC指令合規證明。

gap.en: Although GB 4343.1-2018 and PN-EN 55014-1:2021 share a CISPR 14-1 lineage, Chinese CCC test reports under GB 4343.1 are not accepted as conformity evidence under the EU EMC Directive as transposed into Polish law. Re-testing to PN-EN 55014-1:2021 (identical to EN 55014-1:2021) at an EU-recognised laboratory is required, along with a new EU Declaration of Conformity naming the applicable directive and harmonised standard.
gap.zh: 尽管GB 4343.1-2018和PN-EN 55014-1:2021同源于CISPR 14-1，但在波兰转化法下，基于GB 4343.1的中国CCC测试报告不被接受为欧盟EMC指令合规证明。需在欧盟认可实验室按PN-EN 55014-1:2021（与EN 55014-1:2021完全一致）重新测试，并出具注明适用指令和协调标准的新欧盟符合性声明。
gap.zht: 儘管GB 4343.1-2018和PN-EN 55014-1:2021同源於CISPR 14-1，但在波蘭轉化法下，基於GB 4343.1的中國CCC測試報告不被接受為歐盟EMC指令合規證明。需在歐盟認可實驗室按PN-EN 55014-1:2021（與EN 55014-1:2021完全一致）重新測試，並出具注明適用指令和協調標準的新歐盟符合性聲明。

source.publisher: PKN — Polski Komitet Normalizacyjny (Polish Committee for Standardization)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — re-testing to PN-EN 55014-1:2021 required for Polish/EU market; GB 4343.1 CCC test reports not accepted as EMC Directive conformity evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——进入波兰/欧盟市场需按PN-EN 55014-1:2021重新测试；GB 4343.1 CCC测试报告不被接受为EMC指令合规证明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——進入波蘭/歐盟市場需按PN-EN 55014-1:2021重新測試；GB 4343.1 CCC測試報告不被接受為EMC指令合規證明。

requirement_topic.en: EMC — Immunity and Power Quality (EN 55014-2 / EN 61000 Series) — Poland via EU EMC Directive
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——抗扰度与电能质量（EN 55014-2 / EN 61000系列）——波兰依据欧盟EMC指令
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——抗擾度與電能品質（EN 55014-2 / EN 61000系列）——波蘭依據歐盟EMC指令

summary.en: EMC Directive 2014/30/EU, as transposed in Poland, covers immunity as well as emissions. PN-EN 55014-2:2021 specifies immunity requirements for household appliances including heat pumps. PN-EN 61000-3-2 limits harmonic currents injected into the 230/400 V, 50 Hz Polish public supply network. PN-EN 61000-3-3 limits voltage fluctuations and flicker. Conformity assessment under the EMC Directive may be performed via manufacturer self-declaration with a Technical File (Annex II); no third-party Notified Body is mandatory for EMC, but test evidence must be retained for 10 years.
summary.zh: 在波兰转化法下，欧盟EMC指令2014/30/EU同时涵盖抗扰度和发射。PN-EN 55014-2:2021规定包括热泵在内的家用电器的抗扰度要求。PN-EN 61000-3-2限制注入波兰230/400 V、50 Hz公共电网的谐波电流。PN-EN 61000-3-3限制电压波动和闪烁。EMC指令下的合规评估可通过制造商自我声明并附技术文件（附件II）进行；EMC方面无强制第三方公告机构要求，但测试证据须保存10年。
summary.zht: 在波蘭轉化法下，歐盟EMC指令2014/30/EU同時涵蓋抗擾度和發射。PN-EN 55014-2:2021規定包括熱泵在內的家用電器的抗擾度要求。PN-EN 61000-3-2限制注入波蘭230/400 V、50 Hz公共電網的諧波電流。PN-EN 61000-3-3限制電壓波動和閃爍。EMC指令下的合規評估可通過製造商自我聲明並附技術文件（附件II）進行；EMC方面無強制第三方公告機構要求，但測試證據須保存10年。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/30/EU (EMC Directive) — transposed to Polish law

summary.en: GB/T 17625.1 (harmonic current emissions — national adoption of IEC 61000-3-2), GB/T 17625.2 (voltage fluctuations — national adoption of IEC 61000-3-3), and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (immunity — adoption of CISPR 14-2) are the Chinese equivalents. These share IEC/CISPR lineage with the Polish/EU harmonised standards but Chinese test reports are not accepted for Polish/EU market conformity.
summary.zh: GB/T 17625.1（谐波电流发射——IEC 61000-3-2国家采标）、GB/T 17625.2（电压波动——IEC 61000-3-3国家采标）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗扰度——CISPR 14-2采标）是对应的中国标准。这些标准与波兰/欧盟协调标准同源于IEC/CISPR，但中国测试报告不被接受用于波兰/欧盟市场合规。
summary.zht: GB/T 17625.1（諧波電流發射——IEC 61000-3-2國家採標）、GB/T 17625.2（電壓波動——IEC 61000-3-3國家採標）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗擾度——CISPR 14-2採標）是對應的中國標準。這些標準與波蘭/歐盟協調標準同源於IEC/CISPR，但中國測試報告不被接受用於波蘭/歐盟市場合規。

gap.en: Separate EU/Polish conformity assessment is required. Chinese immunity and power-quality test reports do not substitute for EU Technical File evidence under the EMC Directive as transposed in Poland. A new EU Declaration of Conformity must be issued covering all applicable EMC Directive requirements. Note that the Polish grid operates at 230/400 V, 50 Hz — harmonic and flicker tests must be conducted under these conditions, not the 220 V, 50 Hz conditions common in Chinese testing.
gap.zh: 需要独立的欧盟/波兰合规评估。中国抗扰度和电能质量测试报告不能替代波兰转化的EMC指令下的欧盟技术文件证据。须出具涵盖所有适用EMC指令要求的新欧盟符合性声明。注意波兰电网运行在230/400 V、50 Hz——谐波和闪烁测试须在此条件下进行，而非中国测试中常用的220 V、50 Hz条件。
gap.zht: 需要獨立的歐盟/波蘭合規評估。中國抗擾度和電能品質測試報告不能替代波蘭轉化的EMC指令下的歐盟技術文件證據。須出具涵蓋所有適用EMC指令要求的新歐盟符合性聲明。注意波蘭電網運行在230/400 V、50 Hz——諧波和閃爍測試須在此條件下進行，而非中國測試中常用的220 V、50 Hz條件。

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — separate EU/Polish conformity assessment required; existing Chinese test reports do not substitute for EMC Directive Technical File evidence; grid voltage difference (220 V CN vs 230/400 V PL) means tests must be rerun at Polish grid conditions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——需要独立的欧盟/波兰合规评估；现有中国测试报告不能替代EMC指令技术文件证据；电网电压差异（中国220 V与波兰230/400 V）意味着测试须在波兰电网条件下重新进行。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——需要獨立的歐盟/波蘭合規評估；現有中國測試報告不能替代EMC指令技術文件證據；電網電壓差異（中國220 V與波蘭230/400 V）意味著測試須在波蘭電網條件下重新進行。
